lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: otherwise expressly stated, the following words
terms are not defined in the code requirements
terms are not defined through the methods authorized by this section, such terms shall have ordinarily accepted meanings such as the context implies

arg.ind: a place of human habitation or a place of employment where agricultural products are processed , treated or packaged

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: that a basement shall be considered as a story above grade plane where the finished surface of the floor above the basement is:

a structure is proposed for a purpose which is not specifically provided for in this code requirements, such structure shall be classified in the group which the occupancy most nearly resembles, according to the fire safety

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Exception : Incidental use areas within and serving a dwelling unit

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: Table 2.2.1.1 requires a fire-resistance-rated separation, the incidental use area shall be separated from the remainder of the building with a fire barrier. Where Table 2.2.1.1 permits an automatic fire-extinguishing system without a fire barrier, the incidental use area shall be separated by construction capable of resisting the passage of smoke. The partitions shall extend from the floor to the underside of the fire-resistance-rated floor/ceiling assembly
a building is occupied by two

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Areas of Group H-2 , H-3 , H-4 or H-5 occupancies

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: required by Table 2.28.3.2, areas of Group H-1, H-2

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: areas of Group H-1 , H-2 or H-3 occupancy

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: that the most restrictive applicable provisions of Section 2.3

arg.ind: the use of a building or structure , or a portion thereof , for the gathering together of persons for purposes such as civic , social or religious functions , recreation , food or drink consumption or awaiting transportation

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: - 2.3.1 Assembly Group A. Assembly Group A occupancy

arg.ind: the use of a building or structure , or a portion thereof , for office , professional or servicetype transactions , including storage of records and accounts

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: - 2.4.1 Business Group B. Business Group B occupancy

arg.ind: the use of a building or structure , or a portion thereof , by six or more persons at any one time for educational purposes through the 12th grade

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: - 2.5.1 Educational Group E. Educational Group E occupancy

lrml:Obligation.lrml:Condition: an accurate boiling point is unavailable for the material in question,
, when tested on the intact skin of albino rabbits such a chemical destroys
a small portion is subjected to fire, severe concussion, impact, the impulse of an initiating agent
ignited as to create a serious hazard. A chemical shall be considered a flammable solid as determined in accordance with the test method of CPSC 16 CFR; Part 1500.44, if it ignites

lrml:Bearer.lrml:Agent: Mixtures of these materials with ordinary materials , such as water

Articles , including articles packaged for shipment , that are not regulated as an explosive under Bureau of Alcohol , Tobacco and Firearms regulations , or unpackaged articles used in process operations that do not propagate a detonation or
